item.title: A mirror with extreme reflectivity
item.description: Did you see the most reflective mirror in the world?

item.title: Solar eclipse confuses a rooster
item.description: I share my experience with the full solar eclipse in Oregon 2017

media:content.media:title: Solar eclipse confuses a rooster
media:content.media:description: I share my experience with the full solar eclipse in Oregon 2017

item.title: A volcano reaction you didn't do in school
item.description: I swear, a kid could invent a time machine and still be beat by a baking soda volcano at a science fair.

media:content.media:title: A volcano reaction you didn't do in school
media:content.media:description: I swear, a kid could invent a time machine and still be beat by a baking soda volcano at a science fair.

item.title: Why does silence get so loud in here?
item.description: The loudest sound in the quietest room

item.title: Indoor skydiving reveals rocket physics
item.description: I check if a fan with a ball floating above it feels the weight.

media:content.media:title: Indoor skydiving reveals rocket physics
media:content.media:description: I check if a fan with a ball floating above it feels the weight.

item.title: Pickles as light bulbs
item.description: I make a pickle into a light bulb

media:content.media:title: Pickles as light bulbs

item.title: Making dragon's beard with folding
item.description: I show you how to make edible hair dragon's beard candy

media:content.media:title: Making dragon's beard with folding
media:content.media:description: I show you how to make edible hair dragon's beard candy

item.title: This rock bends in a surprising way
item.description: In this video I show you a special kind of rock called itacolumite that actually bends as a solid rock. Then I show you how to bend regular stone and I teach you about why things bend so much easier when they are thin and how do things fails when they bend.

media:content.media:title: This rock bends in a surprising way
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you a special kind of rock called itacolumite that actually bends as a solid rock. Then I show you how to bend regular stone and I teach you about why things bend so much easier when they are thin and how do things fails when they bend.

item.title: This laser can hear you talk
item.description: A science experiment showing how a laser can detect sound vibrations, turning speech into a visible signal.

media:content.media:title: This laser can hear you talk
media:content.media:description: A science experiment showing how a laser can detect sound vibrations, turning speech into a visible signal.

item.title: Why is this ladybug glued to my pen?
item.description: A curious science question about why a ladybug seems stuck to a pen

media:content.media:title: Why is this ladybug glued to my pen?
media:content.media:description: A curious science question about why a ladybug seems stuck to a pen

item.title: Tesla Turbine
item.description: The answer was way stranger than I expected.

item.title: Taking the iron out of cereal
item.description: I show you how to remove iron from your food and why you are probably getting less iron than you think when you eat iron fortified food.

media:content.media:title: Taking the iron out of cereal
media:content.media:description: I show you how to remove iron from your food and why you are probably getting less iron than you think when you eat iron fortified food.

item.title: Crushing a japanese foil ball
item.description: Watch what the press reveals when the layers finally give way in this simple science experiment.

media:content.media:description: Watch what the press reveals when the layers finally give way in this simple science experiment.
